---
number-sections: false
---

# Practice 7: Classification {#ch-practice-07 .unnumbered}

**Theory connection:** [Volume I, Chapter 7](../chapters/07-classification.qmd)

Use this chapter as the practical companion to the corresponding theory chapter.
Recovered activities are linked where a strong match exists; other sections are
explicit development scaffolds for the next writing cycle.

## Lazy Learning {#sec-pr-07-lazy-learning}

::: {.callout-note title="Practice development scaffold"}
Create an activity that makes **Lazy Learning** observable through a calculation,
small implementation, visualization, diagnostic, or written interpretation.
Include a reproducible input, a checkable result, and one reflection question.
::: 

### K Nearest Neighbors (kNN) {#sec-pr-07-k-nearest-neighbors-knn}

Recovered starting point: [Data, Vectors, and Cosine Assignment](labs/data-initialization-assignment.qmd#sec-lab-data-initialization-assignment).

Use the recovered material as evidence and raw material; revise package calls,
expected outputs, and assessment criteria before assigning it in a current course.

### Other Distance Metrics {#sec-pr-07-other-distance-metrics}

Recovered starting point: [Data, Vectors, and Cosine Assignment](labs/data-initialization-assignment.qmd#sec-lab-data-initialization-assignment).

Use the recovered material as evidence and raw material; revise package calls,
expected outputs, and assessment criteria before assigning it in a current course.

## Linear Classifiers {#sec-pr-07-linear-classifiers}

Recovered starting point: [Probability and Linearity in Data](labs/probability-linearity.qmd#sec-lab-probability-linearity) and [Integrated Data Learning Assignment](labs/integrated-learning-assignment.qmd#sec-lab-integrated-learning-assignment).

Use the recovered material as evidence and raw material; revise package calls,
expected outputs, and assessment criteria before assigning it in a current course.

### Between Centroids {#sec-pr-07-between-centroids}

Recovered starting point: [Data, Vectors, and Cosine Assignment](labs/data-initialization-assignment.qmd#sec-lab-data-initialization-assignment).

Use the recovered material as evidence and raw material; revise package calls,
expected outputs, and assessment criteria before assigning it in a current course.

### Support Vector Machines {#sec-pr-07-support-vector-machines}

Recovered starting point: [Integrated Data Learning Assignment](labs/integrated-learning-assignment.qmd#sec-lab-integrated-learning-assignment).

Use the recovered material as evidence and raw material; revise package calls,
expected outputs, and assessment criteria before assigning it in a current course.

### Perceptron: Toward a Neural Network {#sec-pr-07-perceptron-toward-a-neural-network}

Recovered starting point: [Probability and Linearity in Data](labs/probability-linearity.qmd#sec-lab-probability-linearity) and [Integrated Data Learning Assignment](labs/integrated-learning-assignment.qmd#sec-lab-integrated-learning-assignment).

Use the recovered material as evidence and raw material; revise package calls,
expected outputs, and assessment criteria before assigning it in a current course.

## Non-Linear Models {#sec-pr-07-non-linear-models}

Recovered starting point: [Probability and Linearity in Data](labs/probability-linearity.qmd#sec-lab-probability-linearity) and [Integrated Data Learning Assignment](labs/integrated-learning-assignment.qmd#sec-lab-integrated-learning-assignment).

Use the recovered material as evidence and raw material; revise package calls,
expected outputs, and assessment criteria before assigning it in a current course.

### Kernel SVM {#sec-pr-07-kernel-svm}

Recovered starting point: [Integrated Data Learning Assignment](labs/integrated-learning-assignment.qmd#sec-lab-integrated-learning-assignment).

Use the recovered material as evidence and raw material; revise package calls,
expected outputs, and assessment criteria before assigning it in a current course.

### Multi-Layer Neural Networks {#sec-pr-07-multi-layer-neural-networks}

Recovered starting point: [Integrated Data Learning Assignment](labs/integrated-learning-assignment.qmd#sec-lab-integrated-learning-assignment).

Use the recovered material as evidence and raw material; revise package calls,
expected outputs, and assessment criteria before assigning it in a current course.
